queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of loan duration in months on credit default probability and risk determinants.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with checking account balances falling below zero and their contribution to credit risk escalation.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers linked to the absence of a checking account and their correlation with increased default likelihood.
